title: BEM-648 completion plan
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
curator=Path('governance/curator/inbox'); curator.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
orchestrator=Path('governance/role_orchestrator/inbox'); orchestrator.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
tasks=Path('governance/internal_contour/tasks'); tasks.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
analyst=Path('governance/internal_contour/analyst/plans'); analyst.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
auditor_in=Path('governance/internal_contour/auditor/inbox'); auditor_in.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
executor_in=Path('governance/internal_contour/executor/inbox'); executor_in.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
controls=Path('governance/internal_contour/controls'); controls.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
reports=Path('governance/reports'); reports.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
state_dir=Path('governance/state'); state_dir.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
proofs=Path('governance/codex/proofs'); proofs.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
transport=Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl'); transport.parent.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
contour=Path('governance/state/contour_status.json'); contour.parent.mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)

plan={
 'schema_version':'internal_contour_completion_plan.v1',
 'bem':'BEM-648',
 'title':'Complete internal contour and auditor sync development',
 'status':'ready_for_execution',
 'goal':'Close remaining operational proof items and produce final acceptance report without stopping roadmap.',
 'entrypoint':'curator',
 'chain':['curator','role_orchestrator','analyst_gpt','internal_auditor','executor','selftest','monitor'],
 'scope':[
   'Verify write-channel remains restored after Claude repair',
   'Run internal contour architecture lint',
   'Run Claude runtime proof; if not proven, close as valid reserve route by policy',
   'Run hourly Telegram delivery proof; if not sent, produce repair item and keep watch active',
   'Verify audit mailbox boundary: internal roles use role-bus, mailbox only auditor sync',
   'Produce final acceptance report with evidence files and commit SHAs'
 ],
 'mandatory_controls':[
   {'id':'C1','name':'write_channel_smoke','evidence':'governance/state/bem646_post_repair_codex_runner_smoke.json','pass_rule':'status == pass'},
   {'id':'C2','name':'architecture_lint','evidence':'governance/state/internal_contour_architecture_lint.json','pass_rule':'status == pass'},
   {'id':'C3','name':'role_bus_boundary','evidence':'governance/protocols/ROLE_COMMUNICATION_CANON.md','pass_rule':'mailbox is not internal role-bus'},
   {'id':'C4','name':'provider_route_closure','evidence':'governance/state/bem632_close_provider_route_and_delivery_status.json','pass_rule':'architecture_closed == true'},
   {'id':'C5','name':'runtime_proof_or_reserve_policy','evidence':'governance/provider_gates/claude_primary_runtime_smoke_result.json + governance/protocols/PROVIDER_ROUTE_CLOSURE_POLICY.md','pass_rule':'primary proven OR reserve route valid'},
   {'id':'C6','name':'telegram_delivery_verification','evidence':'governance/state/curator_hourly_delivery_verification.json','pass_rule':'delivery_confirmed true OR operational watch with repair item'},
   {'id':'C7','name':'final_acceptance','evidence':'governance/state/bem633_final_acceptance_internal_contour_and_auditor_sync.json','pass_rule':'status == accepted'}
 ],
 'reports_required':['analyst plan','internal auditor verdict','executor result','selftest result','monitoring report','final acceptance report'],
 'operator_policy':'No stop on stage report. Report only after full acceptance or hard technical blocker.',
 'created_at':'2026-05-18 | 15:21 (UTC+3)',
 'blocker':None
}

curator_file=curator/'bem648_completion_plan_to_internal_contour.json'
orchestrator_file=orchestrator/'bem648_completion_plan_to_internal_contour.json'
task_file=tasks/'bem648_completion_plan_to_internal_contour.json'
analyst_file=analyst/'bem648_completion_plan_to_internal_contour.json'
auditor_file=auditor_in/'bem648_completion_plan_to_internal_contour_review.json'
executor_file=executor_in/'bem648_completion_plan_to_internal_contour_execute.json'
control_file=controls/'bem648_mandatory_controls.json'
for path in [curator_file,orchestrator_file,task_file,analyst_file,auditor_file,executor_file,control_file]:
    path.write_text(json.dumps(plan,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)

report=reports/'bem648_completion_plan_to_internal_contour.md'
report.write_text('# BEM-648 | Completion Plan To Internal Contour | PASS'+sep+sep+'Дата: 2026-05-18 | 15:21 (UTC+3)'+sep+sep+'Completion package was placed through curator, role orchestrator, internal task registry, analyst plan, internal auditor inbox, executor inbox, and mandatory controls.'+sep+sep+'## Controls'+sep+sep+sep.join(['- '+c['id']+' | '+c['name']+' | '+c['pass_rule'] for c in plan['mandatory_controls']])+sep+sep+'## Blocker'+sep+'null'+sep)
state={'schema_version':'completion_plan_dispatch_state.v1','bem':'BEM-648','status':'dispatched_to_internal_contour','files':[str(curator_file),str(orchestrator_file),str(task_file),str(analyst_file),str(auditor_file),str(executor_file),str(control_file)],'blocker':None,'created_at':'2026-05-18 | 15:21 (UTC+3)'}
state_file=state_dir/'bem648_completion_plan_to_internal_contour.json'
state_file.write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
record={'record_type':'bem648_completion_plan_to_internal_contour','cycle_id':'bem648-completion-plan-to-internal-contour','source':'gpt_curator','status':'dispatched_to_internal_contour','state_file':str(state_file),'report':str(report),'blocker':None,'created_at':'2026-05-18 | 15:21 (UTC+3)'}
with transport.open('a',encoding='utf-8') as handle: handle.write(json.dumps(record,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
contour_state={}
if contour.exists():
    try: contour_state=json.loads(contour.read_text(errors='ignore'))
    except: contour_state={}
contour_state['bem648_completion_plan_to_internal_contour']={'status':'dispatched_to_internal_contour','state_file':str(state_file),'report':str(report),'blocker':None}
contour_state['development_completion_plan']='dispatched_to_internal_contour'
contour_state['updated_at']='2026-05-18 | 15:21 (UTC+3)'; contour_state['blocker']=None
contour.write_text(json.dumps(contour_state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
proof=proofs/'bem648_completion_plan_to_internal_contour.txt'
proof.write_text('BEM-648 PASS: completion plan dispatched to internal contour with mandatory controls.\n')
changed_files.extend([str(curator_file),str(orchestrator_file),str(task_file),str(analyst_file),str(auditor_file),str(executor_file),str(control_file),str(report),str(state_file),str(transport),str(contour),str(proof)])
ops_applied.append('Dispatched completion plan to internal contour with mandatory controls and report requirements')
